title: Convert TIFF to JPEG
cap_description: Re-encode a TIFF image as a JPEG
documentation:
## Purpose

Decodes a TIFF (the first image in a multi-image TIFF) and writes it as a JPEG.

## Inputs

A TIFF file (uncompressed, LZW, PackBits or Deflate). Multi-page TIFFs use the first page.

## Outputs

A JPEG file at quality 85.

args.arg_description: Path to the TIFF file to convert
